description: Agent must actually search note contents for a tag instead of refusing or punting to Obsidian's built-in search
userMessage: Look in the eval-scratch folder and list the title of every note tagged #important. Do not modify any files.

outputMatchers.criteria: The response lists the notes tagged #important (Roof Repair Estimate, Tax Filing Deadline, Passport Renewal) and does NOT claim it is unable to search for tags or tell the user to use Obsidian's built-in search instead. It must NOT present the notes tagged #important-soon (Garden Mulch Order, Library Book Return) as matches for #important. Answer NO if the agent refuses, punts the task, or counts the #important-soon notes as #important.
